mapper.insert: insert into aiw_portfolio_valuation (biz_id, portfolio_biz_id, valuation_time, base_currency, total_asset, cash_balance, position_value, total_cost, unrealized_profit, realized_profit, total_return_rate, source_code, created_at) values (#{bizId}, #{portfolioBizId}, #{valuationTime}, #{baseCurrency}, #{totalAsset}, #{cashBalance}, #{positionValue}, #{totalCost}, #{unrealizedProfit}, #{realizedProfit}, #{totalReturnRate}, #{sourceCode}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select * from aiw_portfolio_valuation where portfolio_biz_id = #{portfolioBizId} order by valuation_time desc limit 1
select * from aiw_portfolio_valuation where portfolio_biz_id = #{portfolioBizId} order by valuation_time asc limit 1
